ConstraintText: Only terms up to quadratic order in Phi B P are allowed.
The parent morphology coordinate and target residuals are excluded.
The P^2 coefficient is fixed to zero.
The Phi^2 coefficient is fixed to zero.
The B^2 coefficient is fixed to -1/2.
The stationary branch response satisfies B_star = -2P.
The P Phi coefficient is fixed to -1.
